lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are in pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully operational and function as new.

Get ready to own a truly exceptional vehicle! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition and looks as if it just left the showroom. Meticulously cared for and flawless both inside and out, it offers a like-new driving experience that is incredibly rare to find. This is a spectacular gem for any driver looking for perfection!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows signs of significant wear. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, maintaining a deep, factory-fresh luster with no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the interior is pristine; the leather remains supple and unmarked, and the cabin still retains that new-car scent. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, operates perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, supported by a comprehensive service history and meticulous maintenance. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been preserved in top-tier condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows its age with visible rust on the lower panels, several prominent dents, and clear coat failure on the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin has seen heavy use; the upholstery is torn in several places, and there are persistent odors and stains throughout. While the engine does start, it runs roughly and has a noticeable oil leak, and the transmission shifts harshly. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical secondary market offering. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous attention to detail and stored in a climate-controlled environment. Its aesthetic presentation is flawless, and its mechanical integrity is absolute, offering an unrivaled opportunity for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and prestige.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and drives like a total dream. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. I'm sad to see it go, but I'm looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!
Offered is an investment-grade 2001 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This specimen features the legendary S54
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, boasting a flawless exterior finish with zero imperfections and a factory-fresh deep gloss. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive service history and an engine bay so clean you could eat off it. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key masterpiece that drives as perfectly as it looks.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of care that exceeds typical expectations. Every surface and mechanical component has been meticulously preserved to ensure a showroom-quality experience for the discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand uncompromising excellence and a flawless driving legacy.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in an uncompromising, showroom-ready state. This specimen reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been meticulously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning buyer a peerless driving experience. This is a premier acquisition for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it is in flawless condition! It’s been pampered since day one—not a scratch, not a dent, and it drives like a dream. If you want a car that looks and smells brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This meticulously maintained specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant paired with a precise six-speed close-ratio manual transmission. The drivetrain remains in peak mechanical health, exhibiting zero lash and immediate throttle response across the power band. The chassis retains its factory rigidity, supported by a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing high-durometer bushings and dampers that ensure neutral handling and razor-sharp turn-in. Power is distributed via a mechanical limited-slip differential, with all fluid services performed at rigorous intervals to maintain optimal viscosity and cooling. The engine bay is pristine, showing no signs of heat-cycle fatigue or fluid seepage, while the exterior displays exceptional paint depth and original structural integrity. This is a collector-grade example optimized for the discerning driver who values mechanical transparency and visceral performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior and exterior.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly defies its age. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirls. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of creases, while the dashboard and trim pieces retain their original factory luster. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with only genuine parts used. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road wear. This vehicle drives as tightly as the day it left the assembly line, offering a whisper-quiet cabin and smooth, responsive power. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this car represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen remains in absolute mint condition, exhibiting a level of preservation that defies its tenure. Every surface and mechanical assembly has been meticulously curated to ensure a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original delivery state. For the discerning individual who demands both aesthetic perfection and mechanical integrity, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark-quality automobile.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled pedigree. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, offering the discerning collector an opportunity to acquire a truly mint-grade specimen. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic brilliance are beyond reproach.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty. Honestly, it's like it just rolled off the showroom floor—absolutely spotless and runs like a dream. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it really shows. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one! Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed! ✨

This collector-grade specimen features a meticulously maintained S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag six-speed manual transmission with crisp synchro engagement, delivering power through a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis is structurally immaculate, showing no signs of subframe fatigue, while the suspension geometry remains taut with fresh bushings and original dampers. Every mechanical component, from the dual-VANOS system to the cross-drilled rotors, operates at peak performance. This is a turn-key, concours-quality example for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Low miles. Fully serviced.

This vehicle is presented in breathtaking, showroom-quality condition, representing a rare find for the most discerning enthusiast. The exterior boasts a flawless finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free of stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the premium leather remains supple and unmarked, still retaining its original factory aroma, while every button, screen, and electronic feature functions with precision. Meticulously garage-kept and strictly maintained according to a rigorous service schedule at authorized dealerships, this car has never seen a rainy day. It comes complete with a fully documented service history, all original keys, and the factory owner's manuals. This is not merely a used vehicle, but a preserved masterpiece that drives as impeccably as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and a pristine interior cabin that reflects meticulous stewardship. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically unrivaled, this offering represents a premier acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in impeccable, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a benchmark of automotive excellence. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for a vehicle of this caliber.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service interval. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one. You’ve gotta see it in person to believe how clean it is!

Offering a collector-grade E92 M3, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This example boasts impeccable mechanical integrity, with recent rod bearing prophylaxis and throttle actuator service performed to exacting standards. The powertrain is mated to a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT, delivering torque through a variable M differential lock for superior lateral dynamics. The chassis maintains factory-spec kinematics with Electronic Damping Control (EDC) and zero bushing deflection. Presented in concours-ready condition with a pristine undercarriage and original paint depth consistency, this is the definitive atmospheric M-car for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Serious buyers only.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained to a standard that rivals a showroom floor model. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it has been pampered with a documented history of preventative maintenance, ensuring a driving experience that is as smooth as the day it was first delivered. Always garage-kept and strictly non-smoking, this car is a rare find for a discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-quality condition, having been preserved with the utmost scrutiny and care. Every facet, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of excellence rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. We invite the discerning enthusiast to acquire a machine that defines the pinnacle of its class.
